from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

class CreateCasePage:
    """Page Object for Create Case Page"""
    
    def __init__(self, driver: webdriver.Chrome) -> None:
        """
        Initialize the CreateCasePage object.

        Args:
        driver (webdriver.Chrome): The Chrome webdriver instance.
        """
        self.driver = driver
        self.wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)

    def enter_account_party_id(self, account_party_id: str) -> None:
        """
        Enter the account party id in the input field.

        Args:
        account_party_id (str): The account party id to enter.
        """
        account_party_id_input = self.wait.until(
            EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.ID, "createCaseForm_accountPartyId"))
        )
        account_party_id_input.send_keys(account_party_id)

    def enter_contact_party_id(self, contact_party_id: str) -> None:
        """
        Enter the contact party id in the input field.

        Args:
        contact_party_id (str): The contact party id to enter.
        """
        contact_party_id_input = self.wait.until(
            EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.ID, "createCaseForm_contactPartyId"))
        )
        contact_party_id_input.send_keys(contact_party_id)

    def enter_customer_request_name(self, customer_request_name: str) -> None:
        """
        Enter the customer request name in the input field.

        Args:
        customer_request_name (str): The customer request name to enter.
        """
        customer_request_name_input = self.wait.until(
            EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.ID, "createCaseForm_custRequestName"))
        )
        customer_request_name_input.send_keys(customer_request_name)

    def click_create_case_button(self) -> None:
        """
        Click the create case button.
        """
        create_case_button = self.wait.until(
            EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.ID, "ext-gen509"))
        )
        create_case_button.click()

from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

class CreateLeadPage:
    """Page Object for Create Lead Page"""
    
    def __init__(self, driver: webdriver.Chrome) -> None:
        """
        Initializes the CreateLeadPage object.

        Args:
        driver (webdriver.Chrome): The Chrome webdriver instance.
        """
        self.driver = driver
        self.wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)

    def enter_company_name(self, company_name: str) -> None:
        """
        Enters the company name in the company name input field.

        Args:
        company_name (str): The company name to be entered.
        """
        company_name_input = self.wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "createLeadForm_companyName")))
        company_name_input.send_keys(company_name)

    def enter_first_name(self, first_name: str) -> None:
        """
        Enters the first name in the first name input field.

        Args:
        first_name (str): The first name to be entered.
        """
        first_name_input = self.wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "createLeadForm_firstName")))
        first_name_input.send_keys(first_name)

    def enter_last_name(self, last_name: str) -> None:
        """
        Enters the last name in the last name input field.

        Args:
        last_name (str): The last name to be entered.
        """
        last_name_input = self.wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "createLeadForm_lastName")))
        last_name_input.send_keys(last_name)

    def click_create_lead_button(self) -> None:
        """
        Clicks the Create Lead button.
        """
        create_lead_button = self.wait.until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.ID, "ext-gen548")))
        create_lead_button.click()

from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

class FindCasesPage:
    """
    Page Object for Find Cases Page
    """
    
    def __init__(self, driver: webdriver.Chrome) -> None:
        """
        Initialize the Find Cases Page Object

        Args:
            driver (webdriver.Chrome): The Selenium WebDriver instance
        """
        self.driver = driver
        self.wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)

    def enter_customer_request_name(self, name: str) -> None:
        """
        Enter the customer request name in the input field

        Args:
            name (str): The customer request name to enter
        """
        customer_request_name_input = self.wait.until(
            EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "ext-gen363"))
        )
        customer_request_name_input.send_keys(name)

    def enter_first_input_field(self, value: str) -> None:
        """
        Enter a value in the first input field

        Args:
            value (str): The value to enter in the first input field
        """
        first_input_field = self.wait.until(
            EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "ext-gen357"))
        )
        first_input_field.send_keys(value)

    def enter_second_input_field(self, value: str) -> None:
        """
        Enter a value in the second input field

        Args:
            value (str): The value to enter in the second input field
        """
        second_input_field = self.wait.until(
            EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "ext-gen359"))
        )
        second_input_field.send_keys(value)

    def click_find_cases_button(self) -> None:
        """
        Click the Find Cases button
        """
        find_cases_button = self.wait.until(
            EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.ID, "ext-gen399"))
        )
        find_cases_button.click()

from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

class LeadSearchPage:
    """Page Object for Lead Search Page"""
    
    def __init__(self, driver: webdriver.Chrome) -> None:
        """
        Initialize the LeadSearchPage object.

        Args:
        driver (webdriver.Chrome): The Chrome webdriver instance.
        """
        self.driver = driver
        self.wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)

    def enter_id(self, id: str) -> None:
        """
        Enter the id in the id field.

        Args:
        id (str): The id to enter.
        """
        id_field = self.wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.ID, "ext-gen246")))
        id_field.send_keys(id)

    def enter_first_name(self, first_name: str) -> None:
        """
        Enter the first name in the first name field.

        Args:
        first_name (str): The first name to enter.
        """
        first_name_field = self.wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.ID, "ext-gen248")))
        first_name_field.send_keys(first_name)

    def enter_last_name(self, last_name: str) -> None:
        """
        Enter the last name in the last name field.

        Args:
        last_name (str): The last name to enter.
        """
        last_name_field = self.wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.ID, "ext-gen250")))
        last_name_field.send_keys(last_name)

    def enter_company_name(self, company_name: str) -> None:
        """
        Enter the company name in the company name field.

        Args:
        company_name (str): The company name to enter.
        """
        company_name_field = self.wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.ID, "ext-gen252")))
        company_name_field.send_keys(company_name)

    def click_find_leads(self) -> None:
        """
        Click the Find Leads button.
        """
        find_leads_button = self.wait.until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.ID, "ext-gen334")))
        find_leads_button.click()

from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

class LeadSearchPageUpdated:
    """Page Object for Lead Search Page"""
    
    def __init__(self, driver: webdriver):
        """
        Initialize the LeadSearchPageUpdated object.

        Args:
            driver (webdriver): The Selenium webdriver instance.
        """
        self.driver = driver
        self.wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
        
    def enter_lead_id(self, lead_id: str) -> None:
        """
        Enter the lead ID in the search field.

        Args:
            lead_id (str): The lead ID to search for.
        """
        lead_id_input = self.wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.XPath("(//input[@name='id'])[1]"))))
        lead_id_input.send_keys(lead_id)
        
    def enter_first_name(self, first_name: str) -> None:
        """
        Enter the first name in the search field.

        Args:
            first_name (str): The first name to search for.
        """
        first_name_input = self.wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.Name("firstName"))))
        first_name_input.send_keys(first_name)
        
    def enter_last_name(self, last_name: str) -> None:
        """
        Enter the last name in the search field.

        Args:
            last_name (str): The last name to search for.
        """
        last_name_input = self.wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.XPath("(//input[@name='id'])[2]"))))
        last_name_input.send_keys(last_name)
        
    def enter_company_name(self, company_name: str) -> None:
        """
        Enter the company name in the search field.

        Args:
            company_name (str): The company name to search for.
        """
        company_name_input = self.wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.XPath("(//input[@name='id'])[3]"))))
        company_name_input.send_keys(company_name)
        
    def click_find_leads(self) -> None:
        """
        Click the Find Leads button.
        """
        find_leads_button = self.wait.until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.ID, "ext-gen334")))
        find_leads_button.click()

from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

class LoginPage:
    """Page Object for Login Page"""
    
    def __init__(self, driver: webdriver.Chrome) -> None:
        """
        Initialize the LoginPage object.

        Args:
        driver (webdriver.Chrome): The Chrome webdriver instance.
        """
        self.driver = driver
        self.wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)

    def get_crm_image(self) -> webdriver.Remote:
        """
        Get the CRM image element.

        Returns:
        webdriver.Remote: The CRM image element.
        """
        return self.wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "img.genai-selected")))

    def get_logout_button(self) -> webdriver.Remote:
        """
        Get the Logout button element.

        Returns:
        webdriver.Remote: The Logout button element.
        """
        return self.wait.until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "input.decorativeSubmit.genai-highlight.genai-selected")))

    def hover_over_crm_image(self) -> None:
        """
        Hover over the CRM image.
        """
        self.wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "img.genai-selected"))).hover()

    def click_logout_button(self) -> None:
        """
        Click the Logout button.
        """
        self.get_logout_button().click()

from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

class LoginPage:
    """Page Object for Login Page"""
    
    def __init__(self, driver: webdriver.WebDriver):
        """
        Initialize the LoginPage object.

        Args:
            driver (webdriver.WebDriver): The Selenium WebDriver instance.
        """
        self.driver = driver
        self.wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)

    def enter_username(self, username: str) -> None:
        """
        Enter the username in the username input field.

        Args:
            username (str): The username to enter.
        """
        username_input = self.wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "username")))
        username_input.send_keys(username)

    def enter_password(self, password: str) -> None:
        """
        Enter the password in the password input field.

        Args:
            password (str): The password to enter.
        """
        password_input = self.wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "password")))
        password_input.send_keys(password)

    def click_login_button(self) -> None:
        """
        Click the login button.
        """
        login_button = self.wait.until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.XPATH, "//input[@value='Login']")))
        login_button.click()

    def is_login_page_loaded(self) -> bool:
        """
        Check if the login page is loaded.

        Returns:
            bool: True if the login page is loaded, False otherwise.
        """
        return self.wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "username"))) is not None

from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

class HomePage:
    """Page Object for Home Page"""
    
    def __init__(self, driver: webdriver.Chrome) -> None:
        """
        Initialize the Home Page object.

        Args:
        driver (webdriver.Chrome): The Chrome WebDriver instance.
        """
        self.driver = driver
        self.wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)

    def click_my_home_link(self) -> None:
        """
        Click the 'My Home' link on the Home Page.

        Returns:
        None
        """
        my_home_link = self.wait.until(
            EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.ID, "ext-gen530"))
        )
        my_home_link.click()

    def verify_my_home_link_is_visible(self) -> bool:
        """
        Verify the 'My Home' link is visible on the Home Page.

        Returns:
        bool: True if the link is visible, False otherwise.
        """
        try:
            self.wait.until(
                EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.ID, "ext-gen530"))
            )
            return True
        except Exception:
            return False

    def verify_my_home_link_is_enabled(self) -> bool:
        """
        Verify the 'My Home' link is enabled on the Home Page.

        Returns:
        bool: True if the link is enabled, False otherwise.
        """
        my_home_link = self.wait.until(
            EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "ext-gen530"))
        )
        return my_home_link.is_enabled()

from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

class LeadDetailsPage:
    """Page Object for Lead Details Page"""
    
    def __init__(self, driver: webdriver.Chrome) -> None:
        """
        Initialize the LeadDetailsPage object.

        Args:
        driver (webdriver.Chrome): The Chrome webdriver instance.
        """
        self.driver = driver
        self.wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)

    def get_party_id(self) -> str:
        """
        Get the party ID from the page.

        Returns:
        str: The party ID.
        """
        party_id_element = self.wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "ext-gen812")))
        return party_id_element.text

    def get_first_name(self) -> str:
        """
        Get the first name from the page.

        Returns:
        str: The first name.
        """
        first_name_element = self.wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "ext-gen814")))
        return first_name_element.text

    def get_last_name(self) -> str:
        """
        Get the last name from the page.

        Returns:
        str: The last name.
        """
        last_name_element = self.wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "ext-gen816")))
        return last_name_element.text

    def get_company_name(self) -> str:
        """
        Get the company name from the page.

        Returns:
        str: The company name.
        """
        company_name_element = self.wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "ext-gen837")))
        return company_name_element.text
